Selo's Chords of Cessation  

Description

1: Decrease Hitpoints by 2 (L48) to 67 (L130) per tick if target is not moving
6: Decrease Attack Speed by 5% (L48) to 30% (L81)

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 0 Skill: Stringed
Casting Time: 3 Recast Time: 0
Fizzle Time: 0 Resist: Magic
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
AE Range: 30 Deletable: Yes
Dot Stacking: Yes Reflectable: Yes
Focusable: Yes Dispellable: Yes
Interruptable: Yes Short Buff Box: No
Target Type: PB AE Spell Type: Detrimental
Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: Chords of music bind your hands.
Cast on other: Soandso is bound by chords of music.
Effect Fades: The chains disappear.

Game Description

A collection of chords that binds up to %T nearby enemies in magical cords, slowing their attacks and causing them damage.

Items with this effect

  • Song: Selo's Chords of Cessation

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Song: Selo's Chords of Cessation
ClassLevel
BRD48
Expansion:

Duration:
2 ticks
  • Comments (16)
  • Sold By (4)
  • Quested (0)
  • Screenshots

Merchants:


Abysmal Sea
  • Ylian Darsdi - 43pp 3gp 9sp 8cp

East Freeport
  • Malusuard Blolus - 43pp 3gp 9sp 8cp

High Keep
  • Justin Ryhmes - 43pp 3gp 9sp 8cp

The Plane of Knowledge
  • Minstrel Joet - 43pp 3gp 9sp 8cp

    Ylian "DOES" carry this song
    QuoteReply
    # Aug 09 2010 at 4:55 PM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1592345321793
    2 posts
    As of 8-09-2010 (Today) Ylian Darsdi in Abysmal Sea "Does" carry this song. I'm looking at his inventory and it is in there. It has quantity "----", so it is a stocked item by the vendor and not just a few copies someone sold to him.

    Yilan does NOT carry this song

    Yilan does NOT carry this song

    # Mar 24 2009 at 3:17 PM Rating: Decent

    as of 3/24/09 yilan darsdi carrys it now went to east freeport bought it then came to abysmal and he had it
    ▲ Page top
    SoE Gayness
    QuoteReply
    # Jun 24 2006 at 8:57 PM Rating: Default
    __DEL__1592250757963
    22 posts
    yes well that's what happens when one of many things happens: a few bards camp entire zones with these songs, or a few people get sand in their vaginals because they can't cast a mana-less AoE!

    Way to go whoever you are people, got what you wanted. Real mature, let's tattle tale to momma sony that the weather isn't perfect and you don't have a million plat in the bank. Nice.
    ▲ Page top
    Nerf
    QuoteReply
    # Jan 11 2005 at 6:43 PM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1591777606279
    22 posts
    yes it seems that all bard PB AE spells have been nerfed. you can't hit running mobs with it anymore. it still works when mobs are standing still which would explain the initial dmg when you run by to gether your swarm. these spells are completely useless now. if anyone has a way around this nerf that i haven't seen please share.
    ▲ Page top
    nerf?
    QuoteReply
    # Oct 13 2004 at 7:22 PM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1592760452019
    4 posts
    Does anybody know if these AE songs were nerfed? Was in Dulak today songs were hitting but doing no damage!
    ▲ Page top
    aoe kiting
    QuoteReply
    # Jul 29 2004 at 8:14 PM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1592261702705
    3 posts
    ok first of all this is not a good song to aoe kite with, it is indeed a very small radius and you do have to be very close. Just use denons discord, its much safer.
    ▲ Page top
    RE: aoe kiting
    QuoteReply
    # Aug 13 2004 at 2:26 AM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1593362337626
    160 posts
    uh sure it is... its just as big AE range as CoD..(lvl2 song) and I use CoD in kiting all the time =D
    ▲ Page top
    Bard help
    QuoteReply
    # Jul 27 2004 at 2:57 AM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1593363049345
    2 posts
    ok how do bards do it? i try over and over again to do this PB Area effect Kiting but i never get close enought for them to get hit by it, and when i do get close i get nailed from the back almost killing me so i have to end up using charms and single target dots to kill. need help from someone who knows how to kite this way well plz im on server MM name Suliy
    ▲ Page top
    #REDACTED, Posted: Jul 12 2004 at 7:03 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) is THIS A SONG USED ,WITH THE LVL 18 DENNONS TO AOE KITE ..IM 53D LVL
    stacking
    QuoteReply
    # Jan 16 2004 at 8:25 PM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1592761356612
    45 posts
    Bard songs with haste or slow effects MAY stack...but only the stat increasing/decreasing components stack. The actual haste or slow components will NEVER stack.
    ▲ Page top
    stack?
    QuoteReply
    # Nov 29 2003 at 1:16 PM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1593362812178
    3 posts
